# Project Shree Ram

> NOTE: This site is currently a placeholder (the repository has no site content
> yet). This llms.txt describes the intended mission so AI crawlers and the
> sibling sites have context; it will be expanded once site content is added.

> Project Shree Ram is intended to focus on Hindu–Jewish relations and the
> broader India–Israel relationship — cultural, religious, and civilizational
> dialogue between the two communities and nations.

## About (intended)

- Focus: Hindu–Jewish dialogue and India–Israel relations (people-to-people, cultural, and diplomatic).
- Status: placeholder — no live content or forms yet.

## Related initiatives

Project Shree Ram is one of six independent sibling nonprofit sites:

- [get-out-now.org](https://get-out-now.org/) — diaspora relocation / Law of Return guidance.
- [interfaith-sanctuary.org](https://interfaith-sanctuary.org/) — a non-denominational interfaith sanctuary.
- [thelastdate.org](https://thelastdate.org/) — nonprofit matchmaking initiative.
- [1in56million.org](https://1in56million.org/) — British-Israelite / genealogy research.
- [crypto-jews.org](https://crypto-jews.org/) — Anusim / Converso community and Sephardic genealogy.
